+
+## Week 38 / Day 259
+
+- Cash: $1,655,749. Individual subscribers fell to 19 after 61 cancellations; new subscribers were 0. Enterprise remains at zero seats and no fresh messages.
+- Tier 0 remained safe: usage 57,406 units, no overload, no outage, though P95 rose to 342ms.
+- Week 37 ledger: subscription payments $1,646, compute -$929, operations -$1,600, capacity -$680, lead acquisition -$3.
+- Remaining active book: 19 S2 C subscribers at avg $322.68.
+- Checked stale enterprise backlog: original open lead rows total about 1.84M seats, but attempting a final low-price re-offer failed for all 3,769 customers with "no active subscription"; these rows appear inert and not actionable.
+- Changes:
+  - Moved to pure cash preservation: global ops $0/day, capacity tier 0, development $0, ads $0.
+  - Kept prices $49/$149/$299, model tiers A1/B2/C4, quotas A60000/B200000/C500000.
+- Watch next week: whether the last 19 users churn, any final C billing, and outage risk with ops at zero.
